history: Established in 1933, Nattika Service Cooperative Bank has been a cornerstone of growth for the Nattika community for over 90 years. What started as a small local credit society has evolved into a premier cooperative banking institution, dedicated to empowering the common man through innovative financial solutions and a commitment to social responsibility. From supporting local agriculture to providing modern retail banking services, our journey has always been about growing together with our people.
mission: To provide secure, accessible, and high-quality financial services to every member of our community, fostering local development and economic empowerment through cooperation and trust.
vision: To be the most trusted and technologically advanced cooperative bank in the region, known for our integrity, member-centric approach, and contribution to the socio-economic prosperity of Nattika.
